## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic levels remain higher than pre-refresh, with a good overall trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Content strategy shift: broadening focus from professor-specific to wider audience, aligning with SEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Team to have a more in-depth discussion next week on content prioritization and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Content refreshes are being implemented to improve SEO performance while maintaining existing URLs](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Traffic levels higher than pre-refresh periods](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Good overall trajectory in performance](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Shifting from narrowly focused professor-specific content to broader audience appeal](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Adding more entry-level content to capture wider audience](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Aligning content to capture long-tail traffic while maintaining expertise](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Expanding articles to address general data pipeline concepts, not just Prophecy-specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Ongoing Content Work

  - [Focus on CICD articles, including refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [New articles on data quality monitoring and data quality](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Domain articles addressing both data engineer and data analyst ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Aligning articles with Prophecy's new positioning](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

  - [Reviewing and optimizing keywords for top 20 pages](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

  - [Updating title tags, meta descriptions, and image alt text](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Adding fresh data, examples, and comprehensive information](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Maintaining existing URLs but updating publish dates](https://fathom.video/share/RBD2pfEv5MxLuRkHDT8v8EDMuzd8FkN-?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
